_comment: Curated subset of itzg/minecraft-bedrock-server env vars, mapped to plain-English labels and grouped for the settings UI. Refresh from https://github.com/itzg/docker-minecraft-bedrock-server (property-definitions.json) when new options are needed.

fields.label: Server Name
fields.description: The name players see in their server list.

fields.label: World Name
fields.description: The name of the world folder the server loads.

fields.label: Server Version
fields.description: Which Bedrock version to run. LATEST auto-updates on restart.

fields.label: World Seed
fields.description: Seed for terrain generation. Leave blank for random.

fields.label: Max Players
fields.description: Maximum number of players allowed online at once.

fields.label: Require Xbox Login
fields.description: Require players to be authenticated with Xbox Live.

fields.label: Use Allowlist
fields.description: Only players on the allowlist can join.

fields.label: Idle Kick (minutes)
fields.description: Kick players after this many idle minutes. 0 disables.

fields.label: Server Port
fields.description: UDP port the server listens on.

fields.label: View Distance
fields.description: Max render chunks sent to clients. Higher uses more bandwidth.

fields.label: Tick Distance
fields.description: Chunks around players that are actively simulated (4-12).

fields.label: Force Resource Packs
fields.description: Require all clients to download the server resource packs.

fields.label: Default Permission
fields.description: Permission level granted to new players.
